sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 439 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.11.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2022 without any progress and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On the last date adjournment was granted and a specific date was given, however, once again brief is being held and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
